title: Asia markets trade mixed as oil eases after Trump delays planned Iran strike
summary_full: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed Tuesday, amid lower oil prices after President Donald Trump said he is postponing a scheduled attack on Iran
summary_public: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed Tuesday, amid lower oil prices after President Donald Trump said he is postponing a scheduled attack on Iran

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: oil eases after Trump delays planned Iran strike
